info.name: VibeShopping API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the VibeShopping FastAPI backend. Covers authentication, user management, product catalog, wishlist, cart, orders, payments, addresses, payment methods, reviews, and banners.

Setup:
1. Import this collection into Postman.
2. The base_url variable defaults to the deployed Render API at https://vibeshopping-backend.onrender.com/api/v1.
3. If you want to test locally later, change base_url back to http://localhost:8000/api/v1.
4. Use the Register or Login endpoint first -- the access_token and refresh_token will be auto-extracted into collection variables.
5. All authenticated endpoints will automatically use the Bearer token.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints for registration, login, social login, token refresh, password reset, and session management.

item.name: Register
item.description: Create a new user account with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens on success.

exec: console.log('Tokens extracted and saved to collection variables.');

item.name: Login
item.description: Authenticate an existing user with email and password. Returns access and refresh tokens.

exec: console.log('Tokens extracted and saved to collection variables.');

item.name: Social Login
item.description: Authenticate via a social provider (Google or Apple). Provide the provider name and the ID token obtained from the OAuth flow.

item.name: Refresh Token
item.description: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new pair of access and refresh tokens.

exec: console.log('Tokens refreshed and saved to collection variables.');

item.name: Forgot Password
item.description: Request a password reset email. The server will send a reset link to the provided email address if the account exists.

item.name: Reset Password
item.description: Reset the user's password using a token received via email. Requires the reset token and a new password (minimum 8 characters).

item.name: Get Current User
item.description: Retrieve the profile of the currently authenticated user based on the access token.

item.name: Logout
item.description: Invalidate the current session and log the user out.

item.name: Users
item.description: User profile management endpoints for viewing and updating user information.

item.name: Get Profile
item.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's full profile including name, email, phone, avatar, and account metadata.

item.name: Update Profile
item.description: Update one or more fields of the authenticated user's profile. All fields are optional -- only provided fields will be changed.

item.name: Categories
item.description: Product category browsing and filtering. Categories organize the product catalog into logical groups.

item.name: Get All Categories
item.description: Retrieve the complete list of product categories with their names, icons, sort order, and product counts.

item.name: Get Category by ID
item.description: Retrieve details for a specific category by its UUID.

item.name: Get Category Products
item.description: List all products within a specific category. Supports sorting (newest, price_asc, price_desc, rating), filtering by price range and minimum rating, and pagination.

header.description: Optional. When provided, wishlisted status is included in the response.

query.description: Sort order: newest, price_asc, price_desc, rating

item.name: Products
item.description: Product catalog endpoints for listing, searching, and retrieving product details and reviews.

item.name: List Products
item.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all products. Supports sorting, price range filtering, and minimum rating filtering.

header.description: Optional. When provided, wishlisted status is included in the response.

query.description: Sort order: newest, price_asc, price_desc, rating

item.name: Get Featured Products
item.description: Retrieve a curated list of featured/promoted products for the homepage or discovery section.

header.description: Optional. When provided, wishlisted status is included in the response.

item.name: Search Products
item.description: Full-text search across product names and descriptions. The 'q' query parameter is required. Supports the same sorting, filtering, and pagination as the list endpoint.

header.description: Optional. When provided, wishlisted status is included in the response.

query.description: Sort order: newest, price_asc, price_desc, rating

item.name: Get Product Detail
item.description: Retrieve full details for a single product including description, variants (with SKU, stock, and price overrides), images, ratings, and wishlist status.

header.description: Optional. When provided, wishlisted status is included in the response.

item.name: Get Product Reviews
item.description: Retrieve a paginated list of reviews for a specific product. Each review includes the reviewer's name, rating (1-5), optional comment, and timestamp.

item.name: Wishlist
item.description: Wishlist management for saving and removing favorite products. All endpoints require authentication.

item.name: Get Wishlist
item.description: Retrieve all items in the authenticated user's wishlist, including product names, prices, and primary images.

item.name: Toggle Wishlist Item
item.description: Add a product to the wishlist if it is not already there, or remove it if it is. Acts as a toggle -- calling twice with the same product_id adds then removes it.

item.name: Cart
item.description: Shopping cart management for adding, updating, and removing items. All endpoints require authentication.

item.name: Get Cart
item.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's cart including all items, subtotal, delivery fee, total, and item count.

item.name: Add Item to Cart
item.description: Add a product variant to the cart with a specified quantity. If the variant is already in the cart, the quantity may be incremented.

item.name: Update Cart Item
item.description: Update the quantity of an existing cart item. The quantity must be at least 1.

item.name: Remove Cart Item
item.description: Remove a specific item from the cart by its cart item UUID.

item.name: Orders
item.description: Order lifecycle management including creation from cart, listing order history, and viewing order details.

item.name: Create Order
item.description: Create a new order from the current cart contents. Requires a delivery address ID and an optional payment method ID. The cart is cleared upon successful order creation.

item.name: List Orders
item.description: Retrieve a paginated list of the authenticated user's orders with status, total, item count, and creation date.

item.name: Get Order Detail
item.description: Retrieve full details for a specific order including all line items with product names, variant labels, unit prices, quantities, and order totals.

item.name: Payments
item.description: Payment processing endpoints for initiating and verifying payments against orders.

item.name: Initiate Payment
item.description: Start the payment flow for an existing order. Returns payment gateway details needed by the client to complete the transaction. Optionally specify a payment method.

item.name: Verify Payment
item.description: Verify a completed payment using the order ID and the transaction ID returned by the payment gateway. Marks the order as paid upon successful verification.

item.name: Addresses
item.description: Delivery address management for the authenticated user. Supports CRUD operations and setting a default address.

item.name: Get All Addresses
item.description: Retrieve all saved delivery addresses for the authenticated user.

item.name: Create Address
item.description: Add a new delivery address. The label field is a friendly name (e.g., Home, Office). Set is_default to true to make this the primary address.

body.raw:
{
    "label": "Home",
    "address_line1": "42, Lotus Apartments, MG Road",
    "address_line2": "Near City Mall, Koramangala",
    "city": "Bengaluru",
    "state": "Karnataka",
    "postal_code": "560034",
    "country": "India",
    "is_default": true
}

item.name: Update Address
item.description: Update one or more fields of an existing address. All fields are optional -- only provided fields will be changed.

body.raw:
{
    "label": "Office",
    "address_line1": "7th Floor, Tower B, Prestige Tech Park",
    "address_line2": "Outer Ring Road, Marathahalli",
    "city": "Bengaluru",
    "state": "Karnataka",
    "postal_code": "560103",
    "is_default": false
}

item.name: Delete Address
item.description: Permanently remove a saved delivery address by its UUID.

item.name: Payment Methods
item.description: Saved payment method management. Users can store tokenized payment methods (cards, UPI, wallets) for faster checkout.

item.name: Get Payment Methods
item.description: Retrieve all saved payment methods for the authenticated user. Sensitive data is masked (only last four digits are stored).

item.name: Create Payment Method
item.description: Save a new payment method with a tokenized reference from the payment gateway. The type field indicates the instrument type (card, upi, wallet), and provider indicates the network or service (visa, mastercard, gpay, phonepe).

item.name: Delete Payment Method
item.description: Remove a saved payment method by its UUID. The tokenized reference is also invalidated.

item.name: Reviews
item.description: Product review submission. Authenticated users can leave ratings and comments for products they have purchased.

item.name: Create Review
item.description: Submit a review for a product. Rating is required (1-5 stars) and comment is optional. Each user can typically submit one review per product.

item.name: Banners
item.description: Promotional banner content for the storefront. Returns currently active banners for display on the homepage or category pages.

item.name: Get Active Banners
item.description: Retrieve all currently active promotional banners including title, subtitle, call-to-action text and link, and banner image URL. No authentication required.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Admin dashboard endpoints for store analytics, user management, order overview, product inventory, and revenue reporting. No authentication required (intended for internal use behind a VPN or admin gateway).

item.name: Dashboard Stats
item.description: Retrieve aggregate dashboard statistics including total users, active/inactive users, total orders, order status counts (pending, delivered, cancelled), total products, total reviews, and total revenue.

item.name: List Users
item.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all users with order and review counts. Supports searching by name or email.

item.name: Toggle User Active
item.description: Toggle a user's is_active flag between true and false. Pass the user UUID in the path.

item.name: List All Orders
item.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all orders across all users with customer info and item counts. Supports filtering by order status.

query.description: Filter by status: pending, confirmed, shipped, delivered, cancelled (optional)

item.name: List All Products
item.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all products with category name, total stock, variant count, and primary image. Supports search by name and filtering by category.

item.name: Revenue Stats
item.description: Retrieve revenue breakdown by order status and product category, plus order count by status. Used for dashboard charts and analytics.
